title: General Mills Stock is Steady Staples Play
text: Consumer foods maker General Mills (NYSE: GIS) stock is one of the few stocks that haven't been ravaged by the sell-off in benchmark indexes with positive performance for 2022.

title: General Mills Announces Richard Allendorf, General Counsel and Secretary, to Retire After 23 Years
text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--General Mills (NYSE: GIS) today announced that Richard Allendorf will retire as senior vice president, general counsel and secretary of General Mills, effective August 2022. Allendorf joined General Mills in 1998. “Richard's leadership throughout his tenure has helped position General Mills for success,” said Jeff Harmening, Chairman and CEO of General Mills. “He has provided thoughtful, strategic and practical counsel that has better positioned our company for gro

title: General Mills Recommends Shareholders Reject “Mini-Tender” Offer by TRC Capital Investment Corporation
text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--General Mills (NYSE: GIS) announced today that it received notice of an unsolicited “mini-tender” offer by TRC Capital Investment Corporation (“TRC”) to purchase up to two million shares of General Mills common stock at a price of $65.50 per share in cash. TRC's offer price is 4.48% less than the $68.57 closing price per share of General Mills' common stock on January 7, 2022, the last trading day before the mini-tender offer commenced. title: This Iconic Food Stock Had a Confusing, Noisy Quarter
text: It's getting harder to read the financial results of food makers like General Mills, and the most recent quarter didn't help.

title: General Mills: Slow And Steady Wins The Race
text: General Mills has been among the best performing large-cap Packaged Food companies. In addition to strong operational execution, the company seems to be taking the right steps in terms of capital allocation.

title: Go Bananas for Breakfast! Chiquita, General Mills and Yoplait Team Up to Spotlight the Affordability of Good Nutrition
text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--A balanced breakfast can be key to getting good nutrition and starting the day off right. But too many breakfast options are high-cost and out of reach for average families. Eating nutritious food doesn't have to mean paying more. title: High Yield Stock Watchlist - January 2022
text: There are 21 stocks on my high yield watchlist for January 2022. The majority of the stocks on my watchlist are currently undervalued based on dividend yield theory.
